hero.bio_part1: Software Development & Management Engineer. Specializing in
hero.bio_part2: and building robust, scalable APIs. Passionate about engineering the powerful engines that drive great applications.

suitesCenter.title: [TSU] Professional Internship: Suites Center
suitesCenter.description: Graduation requirement for my Associate's Degree (TSU). Full-stack development of an administrative web application and a promotional landing page, applying academic knowledge in a real-world environment to meet business requirements.

sitie.title: [TSU] Capstone Business Project: SITIE
sitie.description: Direct collaboration with a company to develop an internet service resale system. The project involved working from requirements gathering to the delivery of a functional solution tailored to their operational needs.

rataCueva.title: [ING] Academic Project: Rata Cueva
rataCueva.description: Collaborative development of a gaming e-commerce, simulating the dual role of developer and client to strengthen skills in communication, requirements gathering, and product-oriented thinking.

aivision.title: [ING] Capstone Project: AIVISION
aivision.description: Development of ophthalmological health software for the early detection and monitoring of glaucoma. Built to support clinical workflows and provide practitioners with a reliable diagnostic tool.

puntoFuel.title: [ING] Academic Project: PuntoFiel
puntoFuel.description: Digitalization of local businesses through gamification. The platform encourages customer loyalty and engagement by turning everyday commerce interactions into game-like experiences.

talentHackathon.title: Talent Hackathon — Collaborator
talentHackathon.description: Selected to participate in Talent Hackathon at Talent Land México (Expo Santa Fe), part of the Genius Arena innovation challenge. Competed in the Grupo Salinas – Banco Azteca track, working under time pressure to develop solutions to social, technological, and sustainability challenges, guided by expert mentors from both public and private sectors.

sarexEstadia.title: [ING] Professional Internship: Sarex Enterprise Limited
sarexEstadia.description: Complete re-engineering of an Argentine real estate platform via web scraping. Built a Java Spring Boot bot using Selenium WebDriver to fully migrate and automate data extraction and processing from the legacy system.

sarexBecario.title: [ING] Backend Developer Intern: Sarex Enterprise Limited
sarexBecario.description: Backend development focused on building RESTful APIs and microservices with Spring Boot under agile methodologies. Contributing to the evolution of the platform's core services in a professional team environment.

suitesCenter.description: An administrative web application for managing rentals, rooms, guests, and sales for a hotel, including a promotional landing page.

rataCueva.description: A collaborative e-commerce platform focused on selling products, video games, and items from the gaming world.

shopIn.description: A general catalog e-commerce with plans to evolve into a marketplace, integrating payment gateways and AI for recommendations.

azkali.description: Hackathon project for the Grupo Salinas – Banco Azteca track at Talent Land México. A fintech-oriented solution developed under time pressure, focused on financial inclusion and digital services.

aivision.description: Ophthalmological health software for the early detection and monitoring of glaucoma, built to support clinical workflows and provide practitioners with a reliable diagnostic tool.

about.title: About me
about.p1: My name is Erick Ernesto López Valdés, but in the dev world, I'm known as ErickBeLike. I got into programming out of a curiosity to understand how the video games and applications I used daily actually worked.
about.p2: While I've forged myself as a full-stack developer, my true passion lies in the backend: designing the logic, refining services, and building the efficient, scalable endpoints that make everything run smoothly.
about.p3: I'm a firm believer in finding a way to achieve my goals, no matter the obstacles. You could say I'm guilty of being an optimist, but it’s a trait that drives me to find solutions where others see dead ends. I operate on a simple philosophy: it’s better to tackle challenges with a positive mindset than to be defined by them.
about.mentality_part1: From the world of gaming, I bring a core belief to my work:
about.mentality_part2: When I commit to a goal, I pursue it with relentless dedication, constantly iterating and improving until I achieve mastery.
